candidate.rationale: A clear transition from discussing data processing and wrangling to focusing specifically on text data and regular expressions, indicating a significant shift in the lecture's topic.
The transition marks a significant shift from discussing exploratory data analysis and data properties to addressing specific issues within a dataset, indicating a new major topic.
